features: Packaging: This kit contains 5 toothbrushes. With its sturdy construction and convenient size, this set is suitable for a variety of occasions such as gym bags, cars and desks, ensuring that you always have what you need to maintain good oral hygiene

Foldable Design: With its distinctive and space-saving foldable design, this toothbrush easily compresses to less than half its size, making it the suitable travel companion. Its compact shape ensures that it fits easily into any bag, purse or suitcase, ensuring that you always have your toothbrush with you, whether you're heading to the office, on a weekend getaway or packing for a long trip

Soft Bristles: Our travel toothbrush features a universal brush head size with a more comfortable cap that embodies smart design. The nylon bristles are highly effective at removing plaque and fighting harmful particles and the bad breath they cause, leaving you with a fresh, confident smile

Ergonomic Design: The foldable toothbrush is crafted with your comfort and ease of use in mind, featuring an ergonomic design that includes a soft contoured handle. This thoughtful shape not only enhances grip, but also makes the brushing experience more enjoyable, ensuring that you look forward to maintaining your oral hygiene

Portable: Our foldable toothbrushes will revolutionize your travel experience. These foldable toothbrushes are small and lightweight and take up very little space, so they can easily fit in your pocket, purse, office drawer, travel toothbrush set or toiletry bag
description: Product description Our foldable design serves a dual purpose: not only does it make the toothbrush extremely portable, but it also helps keep the toothbrush from all kinds of germs. By folding the handle, you create a protective barrier that keeps your charcoal toothbrush clean and away from potential germs, making it ideal for those who are on the go and value hygiene. Specifications: Product name: 5pcs foldable portable travel toothbrush Color: Random colors, colorful Material: Plastic + Nylon Product size (cm): 11.5*2.5*1.45cm in unassembled state, 17.7*2.5*1.45cm in assembled and extended state Product size (inch): 4.53*0.98*0.57inch in unassembled state, 6.97*0.98*0.57inch in assembled and extended state Packing list: 5pcs foldable portable travel toothbrush Safety Warning Choking hazard: Small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years. Keep out of reach of children. Do not share toothbrush with others to prevent the spread of germs.
